Inventory export description: Export your current poi ship and equipment inventory to CSV or normalized JSON without opening DevTools.
Inventory export ready hint: Open Poi, make sure your game data is loaded, then choose which inventory export you want to run.
Poi environment required: This button is only available inside Poi.
Inventory CSV export success: Ship and equipment CSVs exported successfully.
Inventory CSV export failed: Failed to export ship and equipment CSVs.
Inventory CSV export canceled: Ship and equipment CSV export canceled.
Ship CSV exported, equipment CSV export: Ship CSV exported, equipment CSV export canceled.
Inventory export settings description: This plugin provides one-click ship/equipment CSV exports plus a normalized inventory JSON export from the main plugin window.
Inventory export settings hint: For the safest install path, pack the plugin and install the generated tarball through Poi's plugin npm environment.
